segment.source: webOS Re:New Program
segment.target: webOS Re:Nuwe program

segment.source: Do you want to proceed?
segment.target: Wil jy voortgaan?

segment.source: Later
segment.target: Later

segment.source: Yes
segment.target: Ja

segment.source: No
segment.target: Nee

segment.source: Close
segment.target: Maak toe

segment.source: Do you want to go to Network Settings now to check the connection?
segment.target: Wil jy nou na Netwerkinstellings gaan om die verbinding na te gaan?

segment.source: Network Settings
segment.target: Netwerkinstellings

segment.source: Cancel
segment.target: Kanselleer

mda:metaGroup.mda:meta: Opgradering sal begin wanneer die monitor afgeskakel is.
Opgradering sal begin wanneer die projektor afgeskakel is.
Opgradering sal begin wanneer die StanbyME afgeskakel is.

segment.source: Upgrade will begin when the %deviceType% is turned off.
segment.target: Opgradering sal begin wanneer die TV afgeskakel is.

segment.source: Starting upgrade.
segment.target: Begin tans opgradering.

segment.source: Upgrade to {arg1} and experience the new webOS.
segment.target: Gradeer op na {arg1} en ervaar die nuwe webOS.

segment.source: Exit the current screen without upgrading.
segment.target: Verlaat die huidige skerm sonder opgradering.

segment.source: Upgrade while powered off
segment.target: Gradeer op terwyl dit afgeskakel is.

segment.source: Enhanced smarter AI and new smart features will make your daily life even more special.
segment.target: Verbeterde, slimmer AI en nuwe slimkenmerke sal jou daaglikse lewe selfs meer spesiaal maak.

segment.source: Upgrade now and explore the completely new platform.
segment.target: Gradeer nou op en verken die splinternuwe platform.

segment.source: View Details
segment.target: Bekyk besonderhede

mda:metaGroup.mda:meta: Die opgradering sal loop terwyl jou monitor afgeskakel is.
Die opgradering sal loop terwyl jou projektor afgeskakel is.
Die opgradering sal loop terwyl jou StanbyME afgeskakel is.

segment.source: The upgrade will run while your %deviceType% is off.
segment.target: Die opgradering sal loop terwyl jou TV afgeskakel is.

segment.source: You can start the upgrade right now.
segment.target: Jy kan dadelik die opgradering begin.

segment.source: The upgrade is in progress in the background.
segment.target: Die opgradering is tans in die agtergrond aan die gang.

segment.source: Upgrade Now
segment.target: Gradeer nou op

segment.source: Unable to upgrade because the network is not connected.
segment.target: Kan nie opgradeer nie, want die netwerk is nie verbind nie.

segment.source: OK
segment.target: GOED

segment.source: Please connect a USB and try again.
segment.target: Koppel asseblief ’n USB en probeer dan weer.

segment.source: Unable to upgrade because the USB is not connected.
segment.target: Kan nie opgradeer nie, want die USB is nie verbind nie.

segment.source: Start your upgrade now.
segment.target: Begin nou jou opgradering.

segment.source: Remove unused apps or content from {arg1} and try again.
segment.target: Verwyder ongebruikte toeps of inhoud van {arg1} en probeer weer.

segment.source: Unable to upgrade due to insufficient storage space.
segment.target: Kon nie opgradeer nie weens onvoldoende stoorplek.
